mapper.select:
SELECT r.id AS "registerId", r.patient_id AS "patientId", r.real_name AS "patientName", d.dept_name AS "departmentName", e.realname AS "doctorName", r.visit_date AS "visitDate" FROM register r LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = r.deptment_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.id = r.employee_id WHERE r.id IN
#{id}
